name: messages_list
description: List recently sent and received SMS messages. Returns paginated results with delivery status.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Filter by direction: 'mt' (mobile terminated/outbound) or 'mo' (mobile originated/inbound).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default 20, max 200.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.
